title: Blockshift (FNAF)
body:
welcome to my modpage of blockshift the fnaf mod this mod will be made for survival and creative building while staying true to both minecraft and fnaf adding stuff like fnaf curtain fnaf tiles fnaf walls animatronics and MORE


timeline of updates:


0.1.0: block alore (adds a tone of blocks) (finished) 
0.2.0: panes and table (curtain panes table and more) (finished) 
1.0.0: the golden age (fredbear and friends) 
2.0.0: the main 4 (fnaf 1) 
3.0.0: grand reopening! (fnaf 2) 
4.0.0: sinister ghosts (fnaf 3) 
5.0.0: bloody nightmares (fnaf 4) 
6.0.0: below the overworld (fnaf sisterlocation) 
7.0.0: simulating much? (fnaf sim)

 
also join the discord for suggestions
